use_cases: Hero section animated background with shield/energy field effect
Loading screen or transition animation with procedural graphics
Decorative visual element for tech-forward landing pages
Showcase demo for shader programming capabilities
ai_summary: A WebGL shader component using custom GLSL that renders an animated shield/energy field effect with hexagonal patterns and spherical distortion. Built with React Three Fiber, it continuously animates based on time uniforms and renders to a fullscreen quad. Ideal for immersive hero sections, interactive demos, and tech-focused visual displays.
